description_long: This is a modern platform bed featuring a dark, solid frame with a tall, flat headboard. The bed is dressed with a thick, ribbed brown blanket that covers a dark gray comforter, giving it a cozy and inviting appearance. Four pillows are arranged at the head of the bed, two in a muted brown and two in a soft gray, complementing the bedding. The mattress is clearly visible beneath the bedding, and the bed sits low to the ground, typical of contemporary platform designs. The frame appears sturdy and minimalistic, with no visible footboard, emphasizing clean lines and a functional aesthetic. The overall look is both stylish and practical, suitable for urban interiors or modern residential settings.
description: A modern platform bed with a dark frame, ribbed brown blanket, gray comforter, and four color-coordinated pillows. The design is minimalistic and cozy, with a tall headboard and no footboard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the tall headboard, layered bedding, and all four pillows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid, flat headboard and the uniform width of the bed frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bed's low profile, bedding layers, and pillow arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bedding, pillow arrangement, and the absence of a footboard.
